final_answer:
Yes: I removed the production startup bypass surfaces for `withoutgiltconsensus`/`devfakeauthor` and made startup fail if those are set via config.

This matters because it prevents non-`GiltConsensus` runs from being treated as valid progress, which was causing invalid testnet evidence and wasted cycles.

What I changed:
- Removed `--gilt.withoutgiltconsensus` wiring from geth CLI flags and config mapping in [gilt_flags.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/utils/gilt_flags.go) and [flags.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/utils/flags.go).
- Added production validation in geth config load path to hard-fail if bypass settings are present in config files in [config.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/geth/config.go), with tests in [config_production_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/geth/config_production_test.go).
- Removed bypass CLI flags from server command in [flags.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/internal/cli/server/flags.go), added hard validation in [command.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/internal/cli/server/command.go), and tests in [config_test.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/internal/cli/server/config_test.go).
- Forced production server eth config to never pass bypass booleans in [config.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/internal/cli/server/config.go).
- Removed bypass references from CLI docs/config examples in [server.md](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/docs/cli/server.md), [example_config.toml](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/docs/cli/example_config.toml), [default_config.toml](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/docs/cli/default_config.toml).
- Removed bypass flag mapping from helper script in [getconfig.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/scripts/getconfig.go).
- Removed bypass startup flags from local scripts in [start.sh](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/test-gilt-docker/start.sh), [start.sh.template](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/test-gilt-docker/start.sh.template), and [start.sh.template](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/test-blockchain/start.sh.template).

Checks run:
- `go test ./internal/cli/server` ✅
- `go test ./cmd/geth -run TestValidateProductionConsensusConfig -count=1` ✅
- `go test ./cmd/geth -run '^$' -count=1` ✅
- `go test ./cmd/utils -run '^$' -count=1` ✅
- `go test ./scripts/... -run '^$' -count=1` ✅

Remaining gap:
- The low-level/test-only bypass logic in `eth/ethconfig` and related test helpers still exists for unit/integration scaffolding (not exposed through the production startup surfaces now). If you want full hard deletion from core/test scaffolding too, I can do that next in a separate cleanup pass.
